# Old 100th SATB baseline fixture

- Work: _Old 100th (original version)_
- Source: Geneva Psalter, 1551
- Composer: Anonymous; traditionally attributed to Louis Bourgeois
- Voices: SATB
- Mutopia ID: `Mutopia-2009/04/11-194`
- Mutopia maintainer and typesetter: Peter Chubb
- Work copyright: Public Domain
- Typesetting dedication: Public Domain / CC Public Domain dedication
- Catalog: <https://www.mutopiaproject.org/cgibin/piece-info.cgi?id=194>
- LilyPond: <https://www.mutopiaproject.org/ftp/Anonymous/Old100-orig/Old100-orig.ly>
- PDF: <https://www.mutopiaproject.org/ftp/Anonymous/Old100-orig/Old100-orig-a4.pdf>

## Tracked bytes

| File                     | SHA-256                                                            | Role                                                  |
| ------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `old-hundredth-satb.pdf` | `55d76255749ecafbb33520e14250e619c5c03e01af800d8995cf17793348201d` | Immutable uploaded Source Artifact                    |
| `old-hundredth-satb.ly`  | `439d4597a70d553188e90daf78b9cce53c2399fc583ca2da8a01af3e259f029c` | Exact Mutopia symbolic source and reviewed test truth |

The PDF footer states that the score is public domain and free to distribute,
modify, and perform. The tracked files were downloaded from the URLs above on
2026-07-16. Tests must preserve the exact downloaded bytes; parser or notation
compatibility belongs in code rather than silent fixture rewrites.

This fixture replaces the former `all-creatures-satb.xml`, whose eight-note
soprano did not contain the LASST UNS ERFREUEN tune it claimed to represent.
